Package index

All functions

ADVI_method()
Automatic Differentiation Variational Inference (ADVI)
Dim()
Define parameter dimensions and types
MAP_Fit
MAP fit object
MCMC_Fit
MCMC fit object
RTMB_Fit_Base
Base class for RTMB Fit objects
rtmb_model()
RTMB_Model インスタンスを生成するラッパー関数
VB_Fit
VB fit object
bayes_factor()
対数周辺尤度からベイズファクターを計算する関数
bernoulli_logit_lpmf()
Bernoulli log-probability mass function with logit parameterization
bernoulli_lpmf()
Bernoulli log-probability mass function
beta_lpdf()
Beta log-probability density function
binomial_logit_lpmf()
Binomial log-probability mass function with logit parameterization
binomial_lpmf()
Binomial log-probability mass function
bw_categorical_logit_lpmf()
Best-Worst Categorical Logit Log-PMF (RTMB optimized)
categorical_logit_lpmf()
Categorical log-probability mass function with logit parameterization
categorical_lpmf()
Categorical log-probability mass function
cauchy_lpdf()
Cauchy log-probability density function
centered_tri_multi_normal_lpdf()
Centered triangular multivariate normal log-probability density function
conditional_effects()
周辺効果 (Conditional Effects) を計算する
conditional_effects(<mcmc_fit>)
MCMCフィットオブジェクトの周辺効果を計算する
dirichlet_lpdf()
Dirichlet log-probability density function
distance()
Euclidean distance
exponential_lpdf()
Exponential log-probability density function
fa_multi_normal_lpdf()
Factor analysis multivariate normal log-probability density function
fabs()
Smooth absolute value function
gamma_lpdf()
Gamma log-probability density function
generate_random_init()
Generate Random Initial Values
half_normal_lpdf()
Half-Normal log-probability density function
inv_logit()
Inverse logit function
inverse_gamma_lpdf()
Inverse-gamma log-probability density function
item_curve(<RTMB_Fit_Base>)
RTMB_Fit_Base の項目反応曲線
item_curve()
項目反応曲線 (Item Response Curve) / カテゴリ反応曲線の計算
item_info(<RTMB_Fit_Base>)
RTMB_Fit_Base の項目情報関数
item_info()
項目情報関数の計算
laplace_lpdf()
Laplace log-probability density function
lkj_CF_corr_lpdf()
LKJ correlation log-probability density function for Cholesky factors
lkj_corr_lpdf()
LKJ correlation log-probability density function
log1m()
Log of one minus x
log1m_exp()
Log of one minus exponential of x
log1p_exp()
Log of one plus exponential of x
log_det_chol()
Log determinant of a Cholesky factor
log_mix()
Log mixture of two probabilities
log_softmax()
Log-softmax function
log_sum_exp()
Log-sum-exp function
logit()
Logit function
logit_normal_lpdf()
Logit-Normal log-probability density function
lognormal_lpdf()
Lognormal log-probability density function
lower_tri_normal_lpdf()
Lower-triangular normal log-probability density function
model_code()
Model Code Wrapper for RTMB
multi_normal_CF_lpdf()
Multivariate normal log-probability density function parameterized by Cholesky factor of correlation matrix
multi_normal_lpdf()
Multivariate normal log-probability density function
multinomial_lpmf()
Multinomial log-probability mass function
neg_binomial_2_lpmf()
Negative binomial log-probability mass function (alternative parameterization)
neg_binomial_lpmf()
Negative binomial log-probability mass function
normal_lpdf()
Normal log-probability density function
normal_mixture_lpdf()
Normal Mixture log-probability density function
ordered_logistic_lpmf()
Ordered logistic log-probability mass function
parameters_code()
パラメータ定義用コードブロック
plot(<ce_rtmb>)
ce_rtmb クラス専用のプロットメソッド (Base R)
plot_acf()
Plot autocorrelation for one variable across chains
plot_dens()
Plot posterior densities for MCMC samples
plot_forest()
Plot parameter estimates and credible intervals (Forest Plot)
plot_pairs()
Plot pairs for posterior samples
plot_trace()
Plot MCMC trace plots
poisson_lpmf()
Poisson log-probability mass function
positive_centered_tri_multi_normal_lpdf()
Positive centered triangular multivariate normal log-probability density function
positive_lower_tri_normal_lpdf()
#' Positive lower-triangular normal log-probability density function
print(<bayes_factor>)
bayes_factor オブジェクトの print メソッド
print(<ce_rtmb>)
ce_rtmb クラスのprintメソッド (自動的にplotを呼ぶ)
print(<summary_BayesRTMB>)
print for summary_BayesRTMB class
quad_form_chol()
Quadratic form using a Cholesky factor
quad_form_diag()
Quadratic form with a diagonal matrix
read_mcmc_csv()
Restore MCMC Fit from CSV
rtmb_code()
StanライクなRTMBモデル定義ブロック (ハイブリッド対応版)
rtmb_corr()
相関行列 (多変量正規分布) 推定ラッパー
rtmb_fa()
RTMB-based Factor Analysis Wrapper
rtmb_glm()
RTMB-based GLM wrapper function (no random effects)
rtmb_glmer()
RTMB-based GLMM wrapper function
rtmb_irt()
RTMB-based IRT (Item Response Theory) Wrapper
rtmb_lm()
RTMB-based Linear Regression wrapper function
rtmb_ttest()
RTMB-based Bayesian two-sample t-test wrapper function
safe_rtmb_model()
安全なRTMBモデルの構築（エラーメッセージ翻訳付き）
softmax()
Softmax function
sort_loadings()
因子負荷量をソートして見やすく表示する関数
squared_distance()
Squared Euclidean distance
student_t_lpdf()
Student-t log-probability density function
stz_basis()
stz basis function
sufficient_multi_normal_CF_lpdf()
Sufficient statistics multivariate normal log-probability density function
sufficient_multi_normal_fa_lpdf()
Sufficient statistics factor analysis multivariate normal log-probability density function
sum_to_zero()
Sum-to-zero transformation
sum_to_zero_multi_norm_lpdf()
Sum-to-zero multivariate normal log-probability density function
test_info()
テスト情報関数の計算
to_centered_matrix()
Vector to centered matrix (RTMB compatible)
to_centered_tri()
Vector to centered triangular matrix (RTMB compatible)
to_lower_tri()
Vector to lower triangular matrix (RTMB compatible)
transform_code()
Transformed Code Wrapper for RTMB
uniform_lpdf()
Uniform log-probability density function
validate_data()
データとパラメータの事前検証
weibull_lpdf()
Weibull log-probability density function
wishart_CF_lpdf()
Wishart log-probability density function parameterized by Cholesky factor of correlation matrix
wishart_lpdf()
Wishart log-probability density function
